ideation: This sequence will show the robot marveling at a snowflake, starting with arms outstretched in wonder, then bringing the hands together gently as if protecting the delicate snowflake, and finally returning to a relaxed pose.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the peaceful and delicate nature of the snowflake. The arms will move symmetrically to maintain balance and visual harmony.

frames.beat: arms spread wide in awe of the falling snow
hands gently cup together, protecting the delicate flake
arms return to rest, the wonder fades
